main_headline: Real-time game data for May 2, 2026 NBA playoff action was not available through live search retrieval. The digest below reflects a data-unavailable state rather than fabricated results.
sub_headline: Search query for '2026-05-03 NBA playoff scores results standings highlights performances' returned no verified live data.

recaps.title: Data Unavailable — No Fabricated Results Provided
recaps.body: A search was attempted for NBA playoff scores and results from the night of May 2, 2026. Live search retrieval was unsuccessful or returned no verifiable data for this date. Rather than generate fictional game scores, series leads, or player stat lines that could be mistaken for real outcomes, this digest is being returned with empty game and series data. Please check NBA.com, ESPN, or the official NBA app for confirmed results from last night's playoff games.

headlines.body: No confirmed game scores or box score data could be retrieved for the night of Saturday, May 2, 2026. All playoff information should be verified through official NBA sources.

This assistant does not fabricate sports scores, player statistics, or series outcomes. Presenting invented data as real playoff results would be misleading. Data integrity is prioritized over producing a filled-in digest.
Visit NBA.com/playoffs, ESPN.com, or the NBA app for live and final scores, box scores, series standings, and highlight videos from last night's games.
